text: Every day, @cokelat_in owner Irena Surosoputra balances her home life with running a business, which can be a challenge, especially during peak holidays. We recently spent the day with Surosoputra and got a glimpse of how she managed Eid orders, helped her family, and fit in some personal time – all in a day. 💚
